title: Value Added and Peace Education Program
content: 10-21st July, 2023 School of Liberal Education, Galgotias University organized the program “Value add and peace Education program” on 10th July 2023 in association with The Prem Rawat Foundation, USA. This program was offered to students as two- credit course. The Faculty members also participated in this Individual development program. The program started with the welcoming speech of our respected Dean School of Liberal Education Dr. (Prof.) Anuradha Parasar Ma’am. Hon’ble Vice Chancellor Sir, Galgotias University Prof. Dr. K. Mallikaarjuna Babu was grace the inaugural session and shared his invaluable perspective. Dr. Suresh C. Gupta Retd Deputy Director General & Scientist- G National Informatics Centre, MCIT, GOI Former Visiting Faculty, Dept of CSE, IIT Delhi, Mr. Col Rajiv Kant Sharan Retd. Colonel, The Indian Army, Mr. K K Miglani Retd. Chief Engineer The Indian Railways, Ms. Lata Sharan Writer, Ms. Amita Rani Gupta Educator, Research Scientist, Dr. Harish Kumar Gupta MBBS, MD, Mr. Rajnish Kumar Director Rajnish IAS Academy, Ms. Poonam Sherawat Lifelong Learner & Educator, Mr. Sanjay Srivastava Manager Reliance Infocom Ltd, Ms. Tanuja Vashistha CEO Isenex Consulting, Dr. Sunil Kumar Retd. Scientist G, Director DRDO New Delhi, Dr. Sunil K Jain Former Senior Director MCIT, GOI, eminent resource persons were in the program to make it successful. This program was organized for 10 days on very important aspects of human life.
